nl: 列出所有學生的姓名與總學分。
sql: SELECT name, tot_cred FROM student

nl: 找出預算超過 80000 的系所名稱。
sql: SELECT dept_name FROM department WHERE budget > 80000

nl: 找出 'Comp. Sci.' 系上的所有課程標題。
sql: SELECT title FROM course WHERE dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.'

nl: 列出所有教授的名字和他們的薪水，並按薪水由高到低排序。
sql: SELECT name, salary FROM instructor ORDER BY salary DESC

nl: 找出在 2009 年秋季 (Fall) 有開課的課程代碼 (course_id)。
sql: SELECT DISTINCT course_id FROM teaches WHERE semester = 'Fall' AND year = 2009

nl: 列出學生 'Zhang' 所在的系所大樓名稱。
sql: SELECT T2.building FROM student AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name WHERE T1.name = 'Zhang'

nl: 找出哪些教授在 'Biology' 系任教，列出他們的名字。
sql: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE dept_name = 'Biology'

nl: 列出所有課程的標題以及開課系所的預算。
sql: SELECT T1.title, T2.budget FROM course AS T1 JOIN department AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name

nl: 找出修過 'CS-101' 這門課的所有學生姓名。
sql: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.course_id = 'CS-101'

nl: 列出 'Physics' 系上所有教授的姓名及其教授的課程代碼。
sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.course_id FROM instructor AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.dept_name = 'Physics'

nl: 計算全校共有多少位學生。
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student

nl: 計算 'History' 系教授的平均薪水。
sql: SELECT AVG(salary) FROM instructor WHERE dept_name = 'History'

nl: 列出每個系所的教授人數。
sql: SELECT dept_name, COUNT(*) FROM instructor GROUP BY dept_name

nl: 找出開課數量最多的系所名稱。
sql: SELECT dept_name FROM course GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl: 列出每個學生的 ID 以及他們修過的總課程數量。
sql: SELECT ID, COUNT(course_id) FROM takes GROUP BY ID

nl: 找出薪水高於全校平均薪水的教授姓名。
sql: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM instructor)

nl: 列出總學分 (tot_cred) 最高的學生姓名。如果有並列，請全部列出。
sql: SELECT name FROM student WHERE tot_cred = (SELECT MAX(tot_cred) FROM student)

nl: 找出至少開設了兩門 3 學分以上課程的系所名稱。
sql: SELECT dept_name FROM course WHERE credits >= 3 GROUP BY dept_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

nl: 找出沒有修過任何課程的學生姓名。
sql: SELECT name FROM student WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT ID FROM takes)

nl: 找出在 2009 年有開課，但在 2010 年沒有開課的課程代碼。
sql: SELECT course_id FROM teaches WHERE year = 2009 EXCEPT SELECT course_id FROM teaches WHERE year = 2010

nl: 找出所有系所中，預算第二高的系所名稱與預算。
sql: SELECT dept_name, budget FROM department ORDER BY budget DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

nl: 列出成績拿到 'A' 最多次的學生姓名。
sql: SELECT T1.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN takes AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.grade = 'A' GROUP BY T1.ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

nl: 找出每個系所薪水最高的教授姓名。
sql: SELECT T1.name FROM instructor AS T1 WHERE T1.salary = (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM instructor AS T2 WHERE T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name)

nl: 列出修習了 'Comp. Sci.' 系開設的所有課程的學生 ID。
sql: SELECT ID FROM takes JOIN course ON takes.course_id = course.course_id WHERE course.dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.' GROUP BY ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT takes.course_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.')

nl: 找出平均學生總學分最低的系所名稱。
sql: SELECT dept_name FROM student GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY AVG(tot_cred) ASC LIMIT 1

nl: 那個...幫我看一下有沒有薪水大於十萬的老師？
sql: SELECT name FROM instructor WHERE salary > 100000

nl: 找一夏資工系(Comp. Sci.)的學省
sql: SELECT name FROM student WHERE dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.'

nl: 找出學生 Snow 的 advisor (指導教授) 的名字。
sql: SELECT T3.name FROM student AS T1 JOIN advisor AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.s_ID JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T2.i_ID = T3.ID WHERE T1.name = 'Snow'

nl: Show me the names of classes taking place in the 'Taylor' building.
sql: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN section AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id WHERE T2.building = 'Taylor'

nl: 找出所有既不是 CS 系也不是 EE 系，而且名字開頭是 'A' 的學生
sql: SELECT name FROM student WHERE dept_name NOT IN ('Comp. Sci.', 'Elec. Eng.') AND name LIKE 'A%'
